sections.paragraph:
ἀγωνίζομαι [ἀγών] ‘to be engaged in a struggle’

—a. specifically of an athletic event, be a contestant 1 Cor 9:25.

—b. most frequently in NT in extended senses: to take up someone’s cause, fight (for) in a life-threatening situation J 18:36; exert oneself, strive, struggle Lk 13:24; Col 4:12; 1 Ti 4:10; cp. 6:12 and 2 Ti 4:7.
